card_1.title: Free Consultation
card_1.description: Visit our office and discuss your needs with our engineers as a clear first step for your project.

card_2.title: Design
card_2.description: We develop a complete plan that connects space layout, details, and the overall character of the project.

card_3.title: Execution
card_3.description: We turn the design into reality with precise supervision and high quality until the project is complete.

card_4.title: Furnishing
card_4.description: We carefully coordinate furniture and pieces to complete the project with an elegant and balanced style.

hero.title_2: with Design That Reflects Your Taste
hero.subtitle: From concept to execution, Into Art delivers interior design solutions that reflect your lifestyle, with a touch that blends luxury, practicality, and precision in every detail.

who.desc: Into Art is a company specialized in interior design services and decorative installation works. We create exclusive and distinctive designs through a carefully studied engineering approach to space planning, serving our clients and giving them a sense of comfort and belonging in their homes or workplaces.

procedure.title: Work Process
procedure.desc: Clear and well-studied stages that ensure an organized experience from the beginning to delivery.

1.title: Consultation and Design Contract
1.desc: A meeting at the company headquarters with our engineers to understand the client's needs, study the project, and then sign the design contract.

2.title: Site Measurement
2.desc: A site visit to take accurate measurements and ensure the project starts on the right foundation.

3.title: Design Development
3.desc: Preparing drawings and concepts in line with the nature of the project and the client's needs.

4.title: Pricing and Execution
4.desc: Preparing quantity estimates, pricing the execution, signing the execution contract, and then starting the work according to the approved drawings.

5.title: Project Handover
5.desc: Completing the work and delivering the project in its final form according to the required quality standards.

featured.title: Featured Projects
featured.desc: A selected collection of our latest residential projects.

residential.title: Residential Interior Design
residential.short: Complete interior design for villas and apartments with a clear process and luxurious finishes.

bullets.1: Define the design style and visual identity of the space
bullets.2: Practical furniture planning, circulation, and function
bullets.3: Material, color, and lighting selections suited to your lifestyle
bullets.4: Execution-ready deliverables with support during implementation

highlights.2: Materials and finish plan that suits the budget
highlights.3: A consistent experience from concept to handover

timeline.value: Depending on project size — usually 3 to 8 weeks for the design phase

scope.value: Villas and apartments — full design or selected areas as requested

1.title: Consultation and Requirement Definition
1.desc: We gather your needs, taste, and priorities and define the project scope.

2.title: Concept and Planning
2.desc: We propose the space layout, design direction, and material options.

3.title: Detailing and Delivery
3.desc: We prepare execution deliverables and review the details until everything is ready for site implementation.

1.a: Yes, we offer supervision options depending on the project package and client needs.

2.q: Can you design a single room?
2.a: Yes, we can design a specific space such as a living room, majlis, or bedroom.

renovation.title: Apartment Renovation
renovation.short: A practical renovation plan with luxurious finishes and a clear execution timeline.

bullets.1: Improve layout and functionality based on your needs
bullets.2: Finishing solutions that suit your budget without compromising quality
bullets.3: Organized selection of materials, flooring, and lighting
bullets.4: Execution follow-up to ensure a handover-ready result

highlights.1: A clear plan that reduces changes during execution
highlights.2: Material selections coordinated for daily use
highlights.3: Better control over cost and quality

timeline.value: Usually 2 to 6 weeks depending on the scale of change

scope.value: Partial or full apartment renovation (finishes / layout / updating elements)

1.title: Site Evaluation
1.desc: We visit the site and identify constraints and improvement opportunities.

2.title: Planning and Options
2.desc: We present layout alternatives and material options with a scope estimate.

3.title: Execution and Handover

1.q: Can you renovate while keeping some existing furniture?
1.a: Yes, we can keep existing pieces in mind and build the design around them when required.

fitout.short: From design to execution: coordination, supervision, and final delivery with luxurious quality.

bullets.1: Project management and coordination between all parties

bullets.4: Final handover after inspection and review

highlights.1: One point of contact for everything
highlights.3: Clear final handover and pre-handover inspections

deliverables.3: Final handover with a snag list

timeline.value: Depending on project size — from 6 weeks to several months

scope.value: Full residential fit-out including coordination, supervision, and handover

kitchen.title: Kitchen Design
kitchen.short: Practical kitchen planning with cabinetry and materials suitable for daily use, with a refined finish.

bullets.1: Functional layout based on workflow and movement
bullets.2: Selection of cabinetry, ceiling, and countertop materials that are durable and practical
bullets.3: Accurate electrical, plumbing, and lighting details

highlights.2: Durable materials that are easy to maintain

timeline.value: Usually 2 to 4 weeks depending on kitchen size

scope.value: Apartment and villa kitchens — new or full renovation

1.desc: We define the usage style, number of users, and appliances.

3.desc: We finalize the dimensions and details so they are ready for the carpenter or supplier.

bathroom.title: Bathroom Design
bathroom.short: Elegant bathrooms with practical layouts, moisture-resistant materials, and precise execution details.

bullets.1: Healthy and practical sanitary layout planning
bullets.3: Appropriate lighting plus mirror and accessory details

highlights.1: Practical solutions for both small and large spaces
highlights.2: Materials suitable for moisture and easy cleaning

scope.value: Guest / master / kids bathrooms — design or renovation

bullets.1: Select flooring suitable for daily use and maintenance

hero.subtitle: Clear answers about process, timeline, pricing, and execution — so you know exactly what to expect.

empty.title: No Results
empty.desc: Try a different category or keyword.

1.q: How do I book a consultation?
1.a: You can book directly through the consultation page on the website. Once submitted, our team will contact you to confirm the appointment and guide you through the next steps.

2.a: After the consultation, we review your requirements and prepare the design direction and proposal. Once approved, we move to contract and execution planning.

3.q: Do you provide a quotation or bill of quantities?
3.a: Yes. Depending on the scope of the project, we provide an organized quotation that includes clear items for materials and execution scope.

4.q: Can I choose materials according to my budget?
4.a: Yes. We usually provide options at different levels and recommend the best balance between quality and cost for residential projects.

5.q: Do you handle execution or design only?
5.a: We can provide both. Many residential clients prefer a complete delivery model (design + execution) with supervision to ensure quality and finishing.

6.a: A specialized engineer supervises the execution, follows up on progress, and ensures the finishing quality matches the approved design.

7.q: How long does a residential project take?
7.a: It depends on the size and scope. After the consultation and scope confirmation, we provide an estimated timeline with key stages.

8.q: Can you execute a style I found online?
8.a: Yes. Share your references and we will adapt the style to suit your space, lighting, and practical needs.

hero.title_1: A Residential Interior Design Team Built on
hero.subtitle: We help homeowners in Kuwait transform their spaces through an organized design process and professional execution.

whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
whoWeAre.text1: Into Art is a Kuwaiti company specialized in residential interior design and execution. We aim to create elegant and practical spaces that align with your lifestyle.
whoWeAre.text2: Our delivery model combines local presence in Kuwait with extended production and support capabilities through a partner team in Egypt — enabling efficient planning and consistent design output.

bullets.1: Residential interior design: villas, apartments, and private spaces
bullets.2: Concept design, space planning, and material selection
bullets.3: Execution supervision and premium finishing quality

note.title: Best Fit for Us
note.text: Clients who value precise planning, refined finishes, and a calm end-to-end experience.

values.title: Our Values
values.desc: The internal standards we apply to every project — from the first meeting to final handover.

1.title: Design with Purpose
1.desc: We prioritize comfort, flow, and long-term usability — not just aesthetics.

2.title: Execution That Matches the Design
2.desc: We focus on details, finishes, and site supervision to achieve the final look.

3.title: Clear Communication
3.desc: Structured steps, timely updates, and transparent decisions.

process.title: How We Work
process.desc: Clear steps that keep the experience professional and the results consistent.

1.title: Consultation
1.desc: We understand your needs, taste, timeline, and space requirements.

2.title: Concept and Proposal
2.desc: We translate ideas into a clear concept and defined direction.

3.title: Contract and Planning
3.desc: We define the scope, timeline, and deliverables before execution begins.

4.title: Execution
4.desc: Our team coordinates site work and monitors quality throughout the project.

5.title: Handover
5.desc: Final inspection, finishing touches, and a smooth handover experience.

callout.title: The Result You Should Expect
callout.text: A luxurious result that matches the approved design — with an organized plan, controlled execution, and a clean handover.

cta.title: Let’s Design Your Space the Right Way
cta.desc: Book a consultation and we’ll guide you through the next steps based on your taste, scope, and timeline.

story.title: Built Around a Simple Belief
story.body1: Into Art was founded with one clear conviction: that residential spaces deserve the same level of precision, detail, and intentionality given to luxury commercial projects. We started as a small team in Kuwait focused entirely on residential work — and that focus has never changed.
story.body2: Over the years, we built a model that combines creative direction with disciplined execution — one that scales across villas, apartments, and private spaces without losing the personal touch our clients expect.
story.quote: Design is not what it looks like. Design is how it works — and how it feels to live in.

mission.label: Mission
mission.title: Spaces That Work and Last
mission.desc: To deliver residential interiors that combine precise design thinking with reliable execution — creating environments that serve their occupants long after handover.

vision.label: Vision
vision.title: The Standard for Residential Interior in Kuwait
vision.desc: To become the most trusted residential interior design firm in Kuwait — known for organized delivery, refined aesthetics, and the confidence we give every client throughout their project.

philosophy.title: Design Philosophy
philosophy.desc: The principles that guide every decision we make — from first sketch to final handover.

1.title: Function Before Form
1.desc: Every layout decision starts with how the space will be lived in. Aesthetics follow a plan that works.

2.title: Materials With Meaning
2.desc: We specify materials based on longevity, tactile quality, and how they age — not just visual impact.

3.title: Detail at Every Scale
3.desc: From ceiling heights to hardware finishes, we control quality at every level of resolution.

different.title: What Makes Us Different
different.desc: The qualities that define how we work — and why clients come back.

1.title: Residential-Only Focus
1.desc: We don't split attention between commercial and residential. Every decision is calibrated for how people live.

2.title: Design + Execution Under One Team
2.desc: No handoff gaps. The team that designs is the team that supervises — keeping intent and output aligned.

3.title: Structured Client Process
3.desc: Every client gets a defined timeline, clear checkpoints, and consistent communication — from first meeting to handover.

4.title: Kuwait-Based, Project-Ready
4.desc: We operate locally, know the market, and maintain a production network that supports fast, reliable execution.

5.title: Post-Delivery Support
5.desc: We don't disappear after handover. We stay reachable and available for questions, adjustments, and follow-ups.

6.title: Honest Scope Management
6.desc: We set realistic budgets and timelines upfront — no hidden surprises mid-project.

hero.title: Let’s Plan Your Interior Project the Right Way
hero.subtitle: Share a few details with us and we’ll confirm your consultation with the right specialist. This is the fastest way to get clear direction for your space.
